IntroPage.title: Your Mobile Banking
IntroPage.description: Send & Receive money instantly. Pay for goods and services between BantuPay users.

AboutPage.title: About Bantu Pay
AboutPage.description: A mobile banking platform built to move money instantly, securely, and without friction — for families, businesses, and communities in the D.R. Congo and beyond.
AboutPage.image_alt: Contemporary illustration symbolizing the fusion of African heritage and modern fintech
story_blocks: It started with a frustration many people know too well. Sending money to loved ones in the D.R. Congo is never simple. It's slow, expensive, and unpredictable. What should have been a quick act of support often turned into a stressful process, with long waits and high fees.
For families, students, and entrepreneurs, this wasn't just inconvenient. It was a real barrier. We believed it shouldn't be this way. So we built BantuPay.
A simple idea: what if sending money felt as easy as sending a message? What if anyone, whether in Kinshasa or abroad, could move money instantly, securely, and without friction?

BantuPay is more than just an app. It's a digital wallet and payment system designed for real life. It allows people to send and receive money instantly, pay for everyday services, and access cash through mobile money agents.
mission_blocks: For too long, access to financial services has depended on where you live, who you know, or what you have. We believe that must change.

Our mission is to break down the barriers that hold people back and replace them with simple, powerful tools that just work. Through mobile banking, we're creating a system where anyone can send, receive, and use money instantly — without friction, without limits.
For millions of people, something as basic as sending money, getting paid, or managing finances is still a challenge. Opportunities are missed. Businesses grow slower.

BantuPay exists to make financial freedom accessible to everyone, no matter their background, no matter their location. Because access to money isn't just about convenience. It's about independence. It's about building a better future.

pillars.title: Security First
pillars.summary: Every transaction is protected, every account is safeguarded, and every user is treated as someone who deserves access to trusted financial tools.

pillars.title: Global Access
pillars.summary: Sending money shouldn't come with penalties. We are building a new standard for global movement where borders don't create barriers.

pillars.title: Speed & Efficiency
pillars.summary: Money moves faster and closer. We believe money should meet you where you are, instantly accessible anytime, anywhere.

pillars.title: Our Vision
pillars.summary: We see a future where anyone, anywhere can participate fully in the digital economy through a seamless financial ecosystem.

pillars.title: Our Impact
pillars.summary: Real impact — not just in numbers, but in lives improved. We're bridging the financial gap for millions in the D.R. Congo.
